summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions Configurator Platform third iteration. Successfully verified dark theme implementation matching recrasolutions.com exactly. Backend APIs fully functional (100% pass rate) with 23 products including 4 douchelezers. Frontend UI excellent with proper dark theme styling (#0a0a0a background, #4ade80 green accents) and all functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns welcome message with RECRA branding
Backend API /api/products returns exactly 23 seeded products (4 douchelezers)
Backend API /api/products/category/douchelezer returns 4 douchelezer products
Backend API /api/products/category/{category} filters correctly for all 8 categories
Backend API POST /api/projects creates new project successfully
Backend API PUT /api/projects/{id} updates project with placed products and zones
Backend API DELETE /api/projects/{id} deletes project successfully
Backend API POST /api/quote/calculate returns accurate CAPEX/OPEX calculations
Backend API POST /api/ai/recommendations returns rule-based recommendations
Backend API POST /api/quote/pdf generates HTML with RECRA branding
Frontend loads with RECRA dark theme branding (background: #0a0a0a)
Dark theme colors properly implemented: surface #121212/#1a1a1a, accent #4ade80
Header shows 'RECRAsolutions' with proper white text and green accent
Found 19 elements with bright green accent color (#4ade80)
Wizard steps display with dark theme and green active states
Project list dialog opens with dark theme styling (background: #1a1a1a)
New project button has proper green background (#4ade80)
Save project button in header saves project to backend
Project name input accepts custom names with dark theme styling
Project type selection works for all 4 types with dark theme buttons
Number of spots input accepts numeric values with dark styling
Douchelezers category exists in product filter dropdown
Douchelezers category shows exactly 4 products when selected
Product category filter dropdown filters products correctly for all categories
Product cards display with dark theme styling (background: #1a1a1a)
Product cards show proper icons, descriptions, and green pricing
Canvas has dark background (#121212) with grid pattern
Canvas tools (select/zone) work with proper green active states
Zone tool changes cursor to crosshair when activated
Drag & drop from product cards to canvas places items successfully
Placed products display with green background and proper dark labels
Real-time product counter updates in header (shows '1 producten')
Quote sidebar tabs (Quote/AI) have proper dark theme styling
AI recommendations panel has dark theme with green accents
PDF export button exists with green styling (disabled until products placed)
Wizard navigation buttons work with proper dark/green styling
Form inputs have dark backgrounds with green focus states
No JavaScript errors detected during comprehensive testing
Toast notifications work with dark theme styling

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (37/37 features working with perfect dark theme implementation)
